title: Vegapunk Names the Prize of the Era
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Robin, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Bonney as The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Those with rare and unique racial ancestry...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: ...Due to some mysterious quirk of history!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What makes my blood so special anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm talking about the distant past...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Back then there was a kingdom of gods up there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government is offering 100 million berries for any information on them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are but a parrot mimicking what you do not comprehend!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can either live as a slave or die.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: nothing else can be tolerated for someone of your i.k.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that is what the tides of time have decided.

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: All those things you did to daddy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your mother... ended up being part of my drug experiments.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanted to be a hero, someone who could save people...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All I ever wanted was for the three of us to live in peace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being alone for so long made me wanna die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're so glad you were born!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That've blessed me in so many ways!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Escape through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
